TextENGNew: Birdsong served as my alarm that morning.
...Huh?
...Wasn't today supposed to be Sunday...?
Wasn't my whole style to stay up late on Saturday night and sleep well past noon on Sunday?
...Why on earth was I awake at such a wholesome hour?@k ...Back to sleep, back to sleep...
``Keiichi~, are you awake~?!@k@vS19/00/992700020. You've got a phone call!``
Just then, the sound of my mother calling from downstairs finally reached my ears.
A phone call?!
I bolted upright and thundered down the stairs.
My mother noticed me coming down and told the person on the other end, 'He's up. I'll hand it over now.'
``Hello?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI08520. It's me.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI08530. And who might this be~?``
``Ahahahaha!@k@vS19/02/990200370. Morning, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS19/02/990200371. What a sleepyhead. Such a sleepyhead!``
``Oh, Rena! What are you calling about so early in the morning...?``
``Hmm, I wouldn't really call this early... it's practically noon, you know?``
It was 11:30.

``If you understand that much, then you can't refuse, right~?@k@vS19/03/990300376. If you're in, then meet at the usual spot at one o'clock!@k@vS19/03/990300377. We're heading into town, so bring your bike.``

``You know, Mii-chan always tells Rena the routes and schedules of the armored trucks for some reason.@k@vS19/02/990200378. ...I wonder why. I wonder why!``

...On a gorgeous day like this, that bright, crystalline laughter felt like the perfect accompaniment.
``Hey, you two!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI08770. Satoko and Rika-chan are already waiting for us, right?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI08780. Quit goofing around and let's get going!``
Round and round they spun, frolicking like a pair of butterflies in a dance. Honestly, I could have watched them forever.
But with all five of us together, it was bound to be even more fun!
``You're right! Well then, let's go!``
``Target: ten billion in loot!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI08800. Once we split the haul, everybody scatter!!!``
